name: indian_visa
title: Indian eVisa Form Walkthrough
description: Fill the Indian eVisa application start form with safe dummy data and stop before captcha submission.
prompt: Open indianvisaonline.gov.in eVisa form, enter fake applicant details, and stop safely at captcha.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
steps.description: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
steps.narration: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening the Indian eVisa portal home page.

steps.caption: Step 2: Open the eVisa application form start page
steps.description: Open the eVisa application form start page
steps.narration: On the next screen, the process stays easy to follow. We open the eVisa application form start page.

steps.caption: Step 3: Select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival
steps.description: Select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival
steps.narration: We continue carefully from here. We select nationality, passport type, and port of arrival. A clean selection here keeps the run from improvising.

steps.caption: Step 4: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
steps.description: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
steps.narration: Next, we keep the flow clear. We fill date of birth and email confirmation.

steps.caption: Step 5: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
steps.description: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
steps.narration: Now we move one step further. We choose visa service. Keeping the choice visible is what makes the flow teachable.

steps.caption: Step 6: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
steps.description: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
steps.narration: On the next screen, the process stays easy to follow. We set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions.

steps.caption: Step 7: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
steps.description: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
steps.narration: That closes the loop cleanly. We stop at the captcha step here.
